titleStmt.title: SII 23.492: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 492. (A.R. No. 492 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the same wall Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 8: 1125-26 A.D.

summary.p: The details of date are given as Makara, śu. 9, Saturday, Anusham (and found to be irregular). This registers still another sale of land, a little more than a vēli in extent, by the same assembly as iṟaiyili maḍappuṟam to the temple of Śonnavāraṟivār for 92 kāśu received by them from a certain Paḷḷikoṇḍāṉ Kūttaṉ Araiyaṉ Nandiyarāyaṉ of Śiṟṟāmūr in addition to 8 kāśu paid for pariśaṭṭam. This land is said to have been assigned to one Sabhāyōga-Geṅgādharaṉ Uyyaniṉṟāḍuvāṉ, a resident of Tiruchchiṟṟambalach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam for the service he was to conduct (daily ?) in the temple and specially on a festival day in the month of Vaigāśi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī. tiripuvaṉaccak
karavattikaḷ śrīvikkiramaco
ḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu makara nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu na
vamiyum canikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉuḻatti nāḷ virutarāyapaya
ṅkaravaḷaṉāṭṭu nallāṟṟūr nāṭṭu prammateyam pūloka māṇikkac
caruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsapaiyom nammur tirumeṟ koyili
le kūṭṭam kuṟaivaṟak kūṭi Iruntu kuṭippeṟkiḻ capaip potuvāka vilai
koṇṭuṭaiyomāṉa nilattu teṉkarai Irāca nārāyaṇa vaḷa nāṭṭut ti
ruveḻuntūrṉāṭṭu viṅkunir tirutturutti Uṭaiyār conṉavāraṟi vāṟku
mulaviruttiyarākiya Āti caṇṭecira tevaṟku nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiili maṭap puṟañ cey
tu kuṭutta paricāvatu pūlokamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattu tiruva raṅkavatikku
k kiḻakku karuṇākaravāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mutaṟ ca(tirat)tirattu nilam�
rai māvaraikkāṇi Innilam veliye yaraimāvaraikkāṇikkum kiḻ pāṟ kellai
maṭappuṟattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vatikku kiḻa
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai kaṇṭiyūr nattattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nila
m veliye yaraimāvaraikkāṇiyum Innilattu meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻ nokkiṉa kiṇaṟu makappaṭa maṭappuṟam Iṟai
yili ceytukuṭuttu Iṟaiyilipporuḷukkum vilaipporuḷukkum ciṟ ṟāmuruṭaiyāṉ paḷḷi koṇṭāṉkūttaṉ A
raiyaṉ nantiyarāyaṉukkāka Ittevar tevatāṉam tirucciṟṟampalac caruppetimaṅkalattu Irukkum capaiyoka
keṅkātaraṉ Uyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ kaiyvaḻi koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu toṇṇūṟṟiraṇṭu Ikkācu toṇṇūṟṟiraṇ
ṭum paricaṭṭattukku koṇṭa kācu Eṭṭu Āka kācu nūṟum koṇṭu viṟṟuk kuṭutta nilam veli yaraimāvaraikkā
ṇi Itil Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāraṟivār tiruvaikācit tirunāḷ tiruveḻaraikku vaṇṇāḷaṉcey nilam kā
lum kumpiṭavantu pūcittu Amutu ceykaykku nilam mukkāle Arai māvaraikkāṇiyum Āka nilamo
ṉṟe Araimāvaraikkāṇiyum capāyoka keṅkātaraṉ Uyyaniṉṟāṭu vāṉum veṟkattārum kaikkoṇ
ṭu cantirāyittavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittu Ippaṭi ceyyak kaṭavar kaḷākavum Innilam nokki Uḷḷa cil
vari peruvari ceṉṉirveṭṭi tiruvācal ponta kuṭimaikaḷ nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Innilam veli
ye yaraimāvaraikkāṇiyum cantirāyittavaṟ cāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyili Aṉupavittu Uṭaiyār coṉṉavā
raṟivār koyil kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟai
yili maṭappuṟañ ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom capaiyuḷḷiruntu paṇittār Irāyūraruḷāḷapaṭṭarum ku
ṇṭur tiṭṭai Akkumāra paṭṭarum vaṟṟalūr cakkaramāṭi paṭṭarum kiṭāmpil purucottama paṭṭarum Irāyūr nā
rāyaṇa paṭṭarum Araṇaippuṟattu koṇṭiyapaṭṭarum paṇikka keṭṭu Inta Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟap piramāṇam Eḻuti
ṉeṉ Ivvūr mattiyattan kaṇṇamaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ Ayyāṟaṉ caṅkara ṉārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Araṇaippuṟattuk koṇṭiya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭurt
tiṭṭai Akkumārapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟṟalūṟ cakkara māṭi paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai U
ṟumputtūr veṇṇayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Irāyūr kūttāṭipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Iḷaiya
koṇṭapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai pāmpuṟattu puruṣottama paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irā
yūr maṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai yiḷaiya nārāyaṇapaṭ ṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Eḻutiṉeṉ Ivvūr mattiyattaṉ kaṇṇamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Ayyāṟaṉ caṅkara nārāyaṇaṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 23.492 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
